description_long: This oven is styled as a classic white fireplace with a rectangular mantel and a broad base extending outward for stability. The front features a large, black-framed opening with a realistic depiction of a burning fire inside, suggesting it is designed to mimic a traditional wood-burning fireplace. The structure is composed of smooth, white panels with subtle decorative molding along the top and sides, giving it an elegant and timeless appearance. The base is wide and flat, providing a sturdy platform that extends beyond the main body on both sides. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the depth and solid construction of the oven. There are no visible control panels, handles, or ventilation features, and the overall finish is sleek and polished.
description: A white, fireplace-style oven with a broad base, decorative molding, and a realistic fire display in the center. The design is elegant and solid, with a smooth, polished finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a plain, flat white panel with a subtle horizontal groove and the wide base extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the oven's depth, the thickness of the mantel, and the layered construction of the body and base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the black-framed fire opening, decorative molding, and the full width of the base platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the oven's depth and the clean, unadorned side panel.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel; the front is dominated by the fire display and decorative molding, with no buttons, knobs, or digital displays apparent.
attribute_door_handle_type: No visible door handle; the front surface is smooth and uninterrupted, suggesting an integrated or hidden mechanism if present.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large rectangular window occupies most of the front, framed in black and centrally placed to display the fire.
